hero.headline: Come home to your breath
hero.subtext: An intimate studio in Meerut for unhurried practice. Small classes, considered teaching, and the quiet luxury of being truly looked after.

philosophy.intro: We are not a gym. We are a small, considered space for people who want depth over noise. Come as you are.

pillars.title: Breath
pillars.line: Every practice begins and ends with the breath. The rest follows.

pillars.title: Movement
pillars.line: Strong, slow, intentional. Movement that listens to your body, not the mirror.

pillars.title: Stillness
pillars.line: The hardest and most rewarding part. We make room for it.

classes.name: Hatha
classes.desc: Slow and foundational. Alignment, breath and patience. Ideal if you are beginning.

classes.name: Vinyasa
classes.desc: A graceful flow linked to breath. Builds heat, strength and ease.

classes.name: Yin
classes.desc: Long, quiet holds that release what the week leaves behind.

classes.name: Pranayama
classes.desc: Breathwork and meditation. The inner practice, taught with care.

instructor.name: Tara
instructor.bio: Trained across Hatha and Vinyasa traditions with over 500 hours of certification and a decade of personal practice. I founded Tulaa Wellness to offer the kind of space I always longed for: unhurried, intimate, and entirely focused on the person on the mat. I teach small groups so no one is ever just a face in the room.

testimonials.quote: The most refined yoga experience in Meerut. Small classes mean real attention, and the space itself is a sanctuary.
testimonials.name: Naina K., Meerut

testimonials.quote: I have practised in studios across London and Mumbai. Tulaa Wellness is in a class of its own. Unhurried and deeply personal.
testimonials.name: Vikram S., Meerut

testimonials.quote: Years of practice and this is the most personal studio I have found. The teaching has rare attention. Worth every minute.
testimonials.name: Ritika A., Modipuram

pricing.name: Private
features: At the studio or your home

faq.q: I have never practised before. Is that alright?
faq.a: More than alright. Most of our students began with us. Start with any Hatha or Beginners class and we will guide you gently.
Only comfortable clothing and water. Mats and props are provided, though you are welcome to bring your own.
Tap any booking button to message us on WhatsApp. We will confirm your place and answer anything you wish to ask.
We are in Modipuram, Meerut. Tap the map below for directions, or message us and we will share the easiest way to reach us.
